1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] A man in a dark grid-patterned shirt stands in a kitchen holding a stemmed glass with red liquid in his left hand. He faces the camera, speaking with mouth movements, against a background of white cabinets, spice jars, and bottles under warm lighting. [6-10] He gestures with his right hand, raising fingers near his chest, opening his palm outward, and then touching his chest before dropping his hand. His gaze shifts briefly to the side. [10-12] He returns his gaze to the camera, raising his right hand again in a loose gesture while keeping the glass steady. [12-14] Finally, the man turns his head to the right into a profile view, raises the glass to his lips, and takes a drink of the red liquid. [14-18] After lowering a stemmed glass of red liquid, the man places it on the counter near spice jars and a cardboard box. [18-22] The camera focuses on a white cutting board holding brown food chunks and a black-handled knife as a hand points at the food. [22-26] Behind the board sit two jars; a hand lifts the glass jar with a yellow label reading "Cento" depicting artichokes, holding it over the sliced food

[26-28] A hand sets a large jar with a yellow label on the speckled countertop and lifts a smaller jar with a white lid. A white cutting board with sliced brown food and a black-handled knife stay in the foreground near a glass of red liquid. [48-60] A silver frying pan filled with yellow oil rests on the stovetop. To the left, a hand grasps the black handle of a knife near a white plate and sink. The hand hovers palm-down over the pan to test the oil's heat, then withdraws. The oil remains still and reflective. Background elements, including a tall oil bottle near the sink faucet and spice jars, remain stationary. The scene is static except for the hand checking the pan and holding the knife.

[62-68] A hand positions a white egg above a silver frying pan containing hot oil. The egg is cracked, dropping the yolk and spreading white into the liquid, which turns opaque. Bubbles appear around the edges. The hand withdraws, leaving the frying egg as the focal point. Static background elements include a sink faucet and bottles on the counter.
[68-74] A hand dispenses black and dark green seasoning specks onto the cooking egg and oil. The granular spices float densely on the shimmering liquid surface. The hand disappears, leaving the silver pan stationary on the stovetop with the seasoned mixture resting inside. The background remains fixed throughout.

[74-78] A silver frying pan containing seasoned oil is lifted to reveal a bright pink electric burner coil glowing intensely underneath. A blurry wooden utensil handle enters the foreground before the pan is placed back on the stovetop. A blurry hand moves rapidly across the foreground, hovering over the pan's interior. [78-82] A hand holding a wooden utensil actively stirs the seasoned oil inside the silver pan. The motion blurs the tool as it mixes spices into the liquid on the black stovetop. Lighting dims slightly, obscuring background details while mixing persists. [82-88] The view shifts to a dark pot resting on the glowing pink electric burner coil. A hand grips a wooden spoon, stirring a steaming liquid mixture inside. The spoon lifts, causing drops of hot liquid to fall back as visible steam rises from the surface in the dimly lit environment.

Between [88-94], a hand maneuvers a wooden slotted spoon to lift yellowish, chunky food from a steaming dark pot situated on the right burner, where the electric coil glows pink. The cooked items are transferred across to a silver frying pan on the left burner, depositing them into hot, seasoned oil. Following this transfer, from [94-100], the hand moves the wooden utensil back into the dark pot on the right to resume stirring the steaming liquid. The silver frying pan sits adjacent on the left, emitting steam into the dim environment. Throughout this sequence, a green digital clock reading "2:43" is visible on the stove's back panel above the burners.
